translation_text: He who in (Dao's) wars has skill Assumes no martial port;
translation_text_raw: He who in (Dao's) wars has skill Assumes no martial port;

translation_text: He who fights with most good will To rage makes no resort.
translation_text_raw: He who fights with most good will To rage makes no resort.

translation_text: He who vanquishes yet still Keeps from his foes apart;
translation_text_raw: He who vanquishes yet still Keeps from his foes apart;

translation_text: He whose hests men most fulfil Yet humbly plies his art.
translation_text_raw: He whose hests men most fulfil Yet humbly plies his art.

translation_text: Thus we say, 'He never contends, And therein is his might.'
translation_text_raw: Thus we say, 'He never contends, And therein is his might.'

translation_text: Thus we say, 'Men's wills he bends, That they with him unite.'
translation_text_raw: Thus we say, 'Men's wills he bends, That they with him unite.'

translation_text: Thus we say, 'Like Heaven's his ends, No sage of old more bright.'
translation_text_raw: Thus we say, 'Like Heaven's his ends, No sage of old more bright.'
